name: Conference Badge
description: Official conference badge. Access to all general sessions and expo areas.

name: Lost Badge
description: A stray conference badge found in the parking garage. Looks like it belongs to someone from TechCorp.

name: Laptop
description: Your trusty development laptop. Battery at 23%.

name: USB Drive
description: A standard USB 3.0 flash drive. 64GB, mostly empty.

name: Mystery Flash Drive
description: An unlabeled flash drive found near the registration desk. Smells faintly of ocean.

name: Power Bank
description: A 20000mAh battery pack. Enough to charge a phone... or a very small laptop.

name: Vendor Coupon
description: A free t-shirt coupon from CloudNine Systems. Sizes: M only.

name: Lost Keycard
description: A keycard to the VIP Rooftop Lounge. Room 2194'd.

name: Presentation Clicker
description: A wireless presenter. Laser pointer included. Useful for pretending to know what you're talking about.

name: Coffee Voucher
description: Free drink at the conference coffee bar. Expires at 5pm.

name: Speaker Pass
description: Official Speaker Pass. Backstage access to the Conference Theater.

name: Napkins
description: A handful of napkins from the coffee bar. Good for emergency keyboard cleaning.

name: Badge Template
description: A blank badge template from Registration. Probably shouldn't fill this out for someone else.

name: Presentation Data
description: The recovered keynote slides. Titled 'Why My Startup Will IPO by Q4 (Copyright Me 2026)'

name: Startup Offer
description: A formal job offer from QuantumByte. Includes equity, a standing desk, and unlimited kombucha.
